zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla Corbet於1238年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire39歲，母親Petronilla Booley22歲。她於1251年與Sir Thomas de la Lee在英國英格蘭史洛普爾皮爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1319年在英國史洛普爾可倫波瑞享年81歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾波莫 希斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronilla Corbet于1238年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire39岁，母亲Petronilla Booley22岁。她于1251年与Sir Thomas de la Lee在英国英格兰史洛普爾皮爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1319年在英国史洛普爾可倫波瑞享年81岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾波莫 希斯。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla Corbet was born in 1238, in Shropshire, England, her father, Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire, was 39 and her mother, Petronilla Booley, was 22. She married Sir Thomas de la Lee in 1251, in Pimhill, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1319, in Clunbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Bomere Heath, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla Corbet est née en 1238, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Petronilla Booley, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de la Lee en 1251, à Pimhill, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1319, à Clunbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Bomere Heath, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronilla Corbet 1238 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire 39 und ihre Mutter Petronilla Booley 22. Sie hat 1251 in Pimhill, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de la Lee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Clunbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in Bomere Heath, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Corbet è nata il nel 1238 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Petronilla Booley, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de la Lee nel 1251, nel Pimhill, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1319, nel Clunbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Bomere Heath, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla Corbetが1238年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshireは39歳，母Petronilla Booleyは22歳であった。1251年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアピムヒルでSir Thomas de la Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1319年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクルンブリーで81歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアボメア ヒースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla Corbet(이)가 1238년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Petronilla Booley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 피힐에서 Sir Thomas de la Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 슈럽실르 클런버이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 봄르 히스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Corbet nasceu em 1238, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla Booley, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de la Lee em 1251, em Pimhill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla Corbet родилась в 1238 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Corbet Justiciar of Shropshire было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla Booley, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de la Lee в 1251 г. в местности пимхилл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности клунбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности бомир хит, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas de la Lee en 1251, en Pimhill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
